query: You are prepping an Apple earnings pre-read for the CIO. Pull exactly the latest 3 annual income statements for Apple so we can compare top-line and margin trend. Step 1: call get_income_statements tool to retrieve the requested income statements.

Risk team is checking Microsoft's near-term balance-sheet resilience ahead of guidance. Return the latest 4 quarterly balance sheets for Microsoft. Step 1: call get_balance_sheets tool to retrieve the requested balance sheets.

Investment memo needs Tesla cash quality rather than accrual earnings. Fetch the latest 3 annual cash flow statements for Tesla. Step 1: call get_cash_flow_statements tool to retrieve the requested cash flow statements.
Trader asked for an immediate spot check before entering an order in Nvidia. What is the current stock price right now? Step 1: call get_current_stock_price tool to fetch the current stock price.
For a January performance recap, retrieve Tesla daily prices from 2025-01-01 to 2025-01-31. Step 1: call get_historical_stock_prices tool to fetch the requested historical price series.
Create a same-day headline brief for Apple and include recent company news items. Step 1: call get_company_news tool to retrieve recent company news.
Compliance wants Apple's most recent annual SEC reports only. List the latest 5 filings of type 10-K. Step 1: call get_sec_filings tool to list the requested SEC filings.
For a forward-looking valuation pass, pull the latest 3 annual analyst estimates for Apple. Step 1: call getAnalystEstimates tool to retrieve the requested analyst estimates.

Quant PM wants Microsoft's ratio trajectory quarter by quarter. Return the latest 4 quarterly financial metrics for Microsoft. Step 1: call getFinancialMetrics tool to retrieve the requested financial metrics time-series.
Before comparing semiconductor names, grab a one-shot fundamentals snapshot for Nvidia. Step 1: call getFinancialMetricsSnapshot tool to retrieve the latest financial metrics snapshot.

Research note needs Tesla revenue mix evolution at annual granularity. Retrieve the latest 2 annual segmented revenues for Tesla. Step 1: call getSegmentedRevenues tool to retrieve the requested segmented revenue records.

Before extracting any section, verify what can be pulled from a 10-K. List available filing items for filing type 10-K. Step 1: call getAvailableFilingItems tool to list extractable filing items for the requested filing type.
From Apple's annual filing dated 2024-11-01, extract the Risk Factors section from its 10-K. Step 1: call getFilingItems tool to extract the requested filing section.
Build a quick issuer profile card for Microsoft by retrieving company facts. Step 1: call getCompanyFacts tool to retrieve company facts.
